items.title: Mastering Prompt Instructions & Personas
items.description: Dive into the world of AI with part 6 of our 10-part AI 101 course. ⬇️ Get started using AI today https://lastrev.com/ This video ...
items.transcript: welcome back and now that we've covered some of the key strategies for improving your AI interactions let's dive even deeper into more advanced best practices in this video we'll discuss the important of providing Specific Instructions and using your personas effectively to achieve the best results from your AI tools let's begin by exploring how detailed instructions can significantly enhance your ai's performance so that that brings me to best practice number five which is provide specific instructions on what you want the AI to do we just showed how giving an instruction of search the web enabled that particular AI model to go out and search the web before it wrote the article ensuring that it had the most latest up to date you want to guide your AI with a clear positive instructions for better efficiency and output and by positive instructions you want to tell the AI what to do do not write your prompts in a way that tells the AI what not to do always have it be positive instructions when you are giving an AI task to do you also want to reduce the ambiguity you know this is one of the I keep going back to this but it's so important by reducing ambiguity by giving it context by giving at details about you your organization what you're trying to do and by being very specific on those instructions just like you were asking one of your employees uh or a contractor to do a job the more specific and the less ambiguity you give that task the better your results are going to be and this way you can actually see immediately how your instructions that you give and have some ambiguity in this and this is one of the amazing things that uh you'll learn as you become a better prompt writer is that by giving really clear instructions to AIS greatly enhances your ability to also uh give instructions and ask for things to humans as well and at the end of the day this enhanced clarity is just going to direct the AI on what to do and its relevance and how applicable it's going to be to the task that you're trying to get the AI to complete so to show this best practice we're going to show a couple of examples that involve being very clear in the instructions that you're giving it so the first one is a brainstorming exercise so the prompt is please list five innovative ways digital marketers can use generative AI to enhance online customer engagement focusing specifically on social media strategies personalization techniques and interactive content creation and for this exercise I'm going to use a base model called mixol mixol is an open-source model and it has huge benefits when using it in the Enterprise but only developers generally have access to these models so in order to Showcase this I'm using a uh service called Gro that's gq.com and they're actually not a company that sells AI models they're a company that makes AI responses fast so you've probably seen how long some of these responses take now when I put this prompt into mixl you see immediate responses once again this is why it's important to try the different tools uh and uh see how they respond to you and what works well in your workflow so here it created Five innovative ways it did it in bu bullet points and I gave it exactly what to um specify so to kind of just showcase that uh side by side let's just run that again with the same one between that and gp4 and we're done as you can see mixol on top of grock is extremely fast so worth checking out for this next example we're going to use one to help us identify challenges that maybe your prospects your customers how you can use a prompt to identify that with very their instructions so the in the prompt on this is identify and explain three current challenges facing the adoption of AI in content creation providing practical solutions for each challenge including tips on implementation and examples of successful integration in the industry so here I'm going to paste this and I'm also going to give it this inst instruction of search the web so that it goes out it searches the web and then can help me identify uh three of the current challenges facing uh AI adoption in content creation so here it's identifying three that I think are very good to point out so first off bias and accuracy's concerns I've told you about how AIS can hallucinate lie make things up um and depending on what model you're using uh be biased so it's important to understand those limitations and how to overcome them uh so that's a great concern uh and a challenge that I've seen uh bringing AI into your content creation process over Reliance on AI this is a big concern as well you don't want to have an over Reliance where all of your ideas are just being generated by AI they'll become very stale non creative very repetitive and just really lack overall human creativity you can tell when a Blog has just output a bunch of AI generated content that has not had humans looking over the content it's pretty obvious uh to a human reader and to search engines so not having an over Reliance on AI and putting this human in the loop is very important and then also to integration uh and workflow disruptions like how do we integrate this into our current workflows with the least amount of disruption to our current work workflow uh and these are all challenges that I think are really great to point out this brings me to best practice number six which is give it a Persona this also helps enhance the relevance it doesn't matter if the Persona is you how you want it to respond to you and everything relevant there or if you're talking about the Persona of who you're writing for in terms of your customers and your prospects or giving it and by it I mean the AI agent a Persona as you've seen in some of our previous prompts you are a digital marketing strategist or act as a publisher this helps frame the conversation and gives contextual Precision so it really helps to frame the conversation for the AI so that it understands you how it should be writing how it should be responding um and who it should be responding and it can really result in really engaging interactions you know there's that old adage in marketing is that if you can craft your message based on how your target Persona and your target audience hears that message you're going to get far more engagement with your products than if you don't write your messaging with that Persona in mind so here we're going to talk about both of those different ways using a couple of examples so the first one we want to assume the Persona of a tech saavy entrepreneur who is always looking for the latest tools to enhance their business operations provide a detailed guide on leveraging AI for market analysis and customer segmentation including the latest technological Trends and practical applications once again I'm going to paste this into chat PT here it's given us a step-by-step guide you know it says Define your objectives and questions select your data sources goes about data collection data cleaning and processing sentiment analysis Trend detection visualization insights and action predict future Trends continuous Improvement and here you can see that it also gives the reasoning of why this is important you can then take these actionable insights and incorporating it into your blogs into your outbound messaging campaign your ad campaigns um all really heavily focused on uh these insights and to go about getting data from your social media and this just shows how you can you know utilize AI to help you brainstorm on process things as well like you know analyzing your different Trends from social media and how you could go about that and use generative AI next one in this we're saying adopt the Persona of an experienced digital marketing specialist who specializes in leveraging AI for creating compelling content strategies suggest five Innovative content marketing strategies that can incorporate generative AI including case studies of successful campaigns here the Persona enhances its relevance by instructing the AI to assume the role of a digital marketing specialist this prompt ensures that the responses will be highly relevant for Content marketers looking to innovates and this Persona based approach really tailors the outputs to the needs seeking more advanced strategies and this directive uh to think like a digital marketing specialist who uses AI helps refine the ai's focus this ensures that the language that it uses the suggestions are all precisely what a Content marketer would find useful uh it directly impacts the specifics and applicability of the advice provided and by giving the AI a professional Persona this makes its interactions more engaging for the users in the digital marketing field it creates a sense of peer-to-peer communication this makes complex AI Concepts more accessible and the advice more actionable as you can see here uh we have here where it's gone through it's identified the strategy now here it made up some case studies once again I tell it this including case studies of successful campaigns it doesn't know your case studies it doesn't have that context so this is also a really important point to point out I asked for it to include case studies of successful campaigns I did that knowing that it would make things up here I have no idea if Netflix uses AI to personalize recommendations I assume they do but this is really really just generic case studies just to really just once again point out that yes I asked for this including case studies you would need to go in and include your own case studies or case studies that are relevant you could also search the web before this prompt uh that would then include links as well and there you have it in this video we explored the importance of providing Specific Instructions and assigning personas to enhance your ai's interactions by being clear and detailed and framing your prompts with relevant personas you can achieve more accurate and engaging outputs stay tuned for our next video where we'll dive into Advanced Techniques like Chain of Thought prompting and breaking down complex tasks to optimize your ai's performance
